action.reasoning: Observation: Robot stuck behind obstacle due to overly aggressive depth-based collision avoidance. Gets 611 collisions, never finds human. Analysis: Depth avoidance prevents all forward motion. Need to remove it and use simple aggressive pursuit. The robot should just drive toward the human at max speed. Decision: Rewrite predict.py with minimal controller - turn toward human, drive forward aggressively, only slow down in safe zone. No depth avoidance.
